mnemonics.title: Row-Major Order
mnemonics.content: Remember 'ROW comes first' - In C, 2D arrays are stored in Row-major order: Rows before Columns.

mnemonics.title: Declaration Syntax
mnemonics.content: Use 'RC Cola' to remember: Rows then Columns in declaration: array[Rows][Columns]

mnemonics.title: Initialization Rule
mnemonics.content: COLS are Compulsory, ROWS are Optional - When initializing, you must specify columns but can omit rows.
